title: Review: sieve-form 0.1.0 full project iteration 2
notes: Iteration 2 confidence: 75% chance of missed bug. Least confident: (1) whether any other non-envelope extension test names could be added in the future and would silently bypass check_extension_use via the same root cause (the architecture of the check is structurally fragile for tests used after 'not' or in elsif); (2) whether the bare_address strip_trailing_comment path handles quoted display-name forms without angle brackets correctly (known edge case, not new). All confirmed bugs filed as crate-sieve-form-cxs.1, .2, .3. SEC7: YES
